message:
bd-2zypv: add constraint-based layout hints via %%{ftui:...}%% directives

Add LayoutConstraint enum (SameRank, MinLength, Pin, OrderInRank) to
the Mermaid IR and parse ftui: prefixed directives in normalize_ast_to_ir.
Apply constraints in mermaid_layout pipeline: rank merging after
assign_ranks, order enforcement after crossing minimization, and pin
overrides after coordinate assignment.

Also fixes render_mode_auto_selects_block_for_xterm test (config default
was Braille, not Auto) and gates broken canvas tests behind feature flag.

13 new tests, 505 total passing, clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
